creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: I am closing this because the most critical issue reported here was a duplicate o the bug 224059 which has been fixed. Knobs "dev.em.0.iflib.override_ntxds" and "dev.em.0.iflib.override_nrxds" superseding "hw.em.rxd" and "hw.em.txd" are still not properly documented in em(4) manual page, but this is a minor issue only.
